scope: Expose run/install/test operations via services/runner routes that wrap existing sandbox and dependency logic with API parity.

sources.summary: Current monolith POST /api/run-tests route computes slug, resolves project output path, and calls runInSandbox before returning the RunResult JSON.
Sandbox executor that installs dependencies, selects test command, streams logs, and returns validated RunResult shape.
ensureDependencies(projectRoot, timeoutMs) installs npm packages with ci/install fallback, returning install metadata.
runUIValidation(projectRoot, options) orchestrates Playwright and Lighthouse validations producing UIValidationResult payload.

planned_changes: Add services/runner/src/routes/{run,install,test}.ts exporting Express routers that validate input and invoke domain functions.
Reuse slugify + OUTPUT_DIR resolution to mirror monolith /api/run-tests behavior for parity.
Mount new routers in services/runner/src/server.ts before 404 handler and expand Vitest coverage for happy/error paths.
Document dependency needs (slugify) to align slug normalization with monolith behavior.
risks: Incorrect request validation could break monolith proxy expectations once RUNNER_URL is enabled.
Missing slug normalization or differing error shapes might fail existing UI integrations relying on { error: string } payloads.
